scope_note: Synthetic second-domain gold set for portfolio validation. It is not legal advice and does not replace the official Swiss QR-bill implementation guidelines.

obligations.obligation: Payment part must contain a Swiss QR Code with payment information required for digital processing.
QR reference must be used with QR-IBAN and must not be combined with regular IBAN.
SCOR creditor reference must use regular IBAN rather than QR-IBAN.
No structured reference may use regular IBAN with an unstructured message.
Validate allowed currency, reference and account combinations before rendering.
Printed payment part must not contradict the machine-readable QR payload.
Structured address data should be captured in explicit fields when structured-address validation is required.
Block export when mandatory structured debtor or creditor address fields are missing.
Provide a validation report explaining failed payment fields and reasons.
Do not claim syntactic QR-bill validity guarantees regulatory or bank acceptance in all cases.
